messages.content:
What is an advantage of using a fully-integrated cloud-based data analytics platform?


It improves the quality of data and the data literacy of all employees.


It ensures the accurate and timely collection of data at the source.


It eliminates the client's responsibility for security by transferring this function to the Cloud Vendor.


It provides the computing power needed to convert raw data into meaningful information for decision makers.


I don't know this yet.
The advantage of using a fully-integrated cloud-based data analytics platform is that it provides the computing power needed to convert raw data into meaningful information for decision makers.

What is an example of Big Data?


providing real-time data feeds on millions of people with wearable devices


entering and tracking a company's daily transaction records in a spreadsheet


sending user survey responses from various store branches to a single, central database


tracking the work hours of 100 employees with a real-time dashboard


I don't know this yet.
An example of Big Data would be providing real-time data feeds on millions of people with wearable devices.

What should a company do to develop a better data culture?


Designate time to think about and define the “art of the possible,” so they can feel more confident about the different methods of using their data.


Have the Data Architects redesign the engineering processes and responsibilities so that the Engineers will be responsible for the data management of the company.


Ensure that everyone in the company understands the importance of data and are aware of what data can do to improve business processes.


Show how the company's data usage will appeal to the human aspects of trust, ownership, and ethical use of their employee data.


I don't know this yet.
To develop a better data culture, a company should ensure that everyone in the organization understands the importance of data and is aware of what data can do to improve business processes.

What function do regulations like the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) serve?


to allow government agencies access to companies' customer data in the case of criminal proceedings


to encourage companies to invest in data protection through compliance subsidies


to enforce the protection of consumer data through criminal penalties against non-compliant corporations


to ensure companies are safeguarding customer data according to a set of minimum standards


I don't know this yet.
The function of regulations like the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) is to ensure companies are safeguarding customer data according to a set of minimum standards.

What is the purpose of a company’s data strategy?


to market and sell its collected data to users


to monitor data usage to manage infrastructure budgets


to collect, store, manage, share, and use data


to set up its IT infrastructure to collect data


I don't know this yet.

The purpose of a company's data strategy is to collect, store, manage, share, and use data effectively and efficiently for various business purposes such as decision-making, improving processes, and gaining insights.

Which scenario best illustrates the implementation of data governance?


drafting a press release based on data extracted from the news of the day


investing in real estate in emerging areas based on forecasted data


using the right permissions to collect and store data, and process it according to organizational guidelines


redesigning existing company products based on feedback data from online customer reviews


I don't know this yet.

Using the right permissions to collect and store data, and process it according to organizational guidelines best illustrates the implementation of data governance. Data governance involves establishing policies and procedures to ensure proper management, protection, and utilization of data within an organization.

How does Accenture help companies harness the power of data to achieve optimal business outcomes?


They utilize only their data and analytics platform to enable companies.


They develop data governance frameworks that go on to form the basis of the company's data analytics strategy.


They provide an interactive front end for a database solution that changes the data culture.


They help companies think about and define the "art of the possible" with their data assets.


I don't know this yet.

Accenture helps companies harness the power of data to achieve optimal business outcomes by helping them think about and define the "art of the possible" with their data assets. They assist in identifying opportunities, developing data strategies, implementing data governance frameworks, and utilizing advanced analytics to drive value from data.

Where does change management play a major role in transforming a client business into a data-driven, intelligent enterprise?


data governance and management


data culture and literacy


data and analytics strategy


data and analytics platform


I don't know this yet.

Change management plays a major role in transforming a client business into a data-driven, intelligent enterprise in several areas, including data culture and literacy, data governance and management, data and analytics strategy, and data and analytics platform. It involves guiding and facilitating organizational and cultural shifts, ensuring adoption of new processes and technologies, and promoting data-driven decision-making throughout the organization.

What does data warehousing allow organizations to achieve?


allows for the reduction of some of an organization's day-to-day server resources


allows organizations to replace all their day-to-day databases with operational systems


allows organizations to collect only the current day's data from their various databases


allows for analytics and reporting across the entire organization


I don't know this yet.

Data warehousing allows organizations to achieve analytics and reporting across the entire organization. It involves consolidating, organizing, and integrating data from various sources into a central repository, providing a unified view of the organization's data. This allows for efficient and comprehensive analysis, reporting, and decision-making across different departments and functions within the organization.
